Your Guide

I'm Sebenzile.
I fixed this for myself first.

I use my engineering background to fix the broken processes that force you to babysit your business every day.

The result is a rock-solid system that runs correctly without you — letting you finally focus on growth instead of putting out fires. I developed the ability to look at any workflow and immediately see where the time is leaking — and exactly how to close it.

What I do isn't complicated. I use the tools you already know — combined with AI and automation — to build systems that handle the repetitive work for you. Then I hand it over, trained and running, with 30 days of support to make sure it sticks.

"I didn't start SEBWORKS as a consultant. I started it as someone who was drowning in admin — and figured out how to fix it."

I work specifically with small businesses — 1 to 50 people — because that's where the impact is most immediate. When you save 5 hours a week, you feel it everywhere: in your business, in your family, in your life.

Engineering Background Pretoria, South Africa 1–50 Person Teams No Tech Skills Needed
Does This Sound Like You?

A story I hear every week.

Follow this journey. If you recognise yourself in any of these moments — you're in the right place.

01
The Daily Reality
You're always answering messages.

You always need to be manually answering customer inquiries because your business depends on it. You can't switch off — not even for a few hours — because if you do, things fall through the cracks. You've thought about hiring someone, but that feels like another problem to manage.

Sound familiar? Keep reading.
02
The Time Drain
Booking takes the whole day.

You spend half your day going back and forth with clients to schedule appointments. What should take two minutes takes forty-five. By the time it's confirmed, half your morning is gone. And you have six more to do today.

You know there's a better way. There is.
03
The Invisible Ceiling
More clients means more admin — and you're afraid to grow.

So you're afraid of getting more clients because that means more admin to do. You're turning down opportunities because you know that growth just means more overwhelm. The system you have can't scale. And you're too busy running it to fix it.

This is exactly what I fix. Let me show you how.
04
What Changes
Your business runs. You live.

You gain your freedom back — 5+ hours per week to scale your business, spend time with family, or take a real weekend off. Your business stays open while you sleep, and you wake up to a day organised and ready for revenue. Double your capacity without ever hiring another admin.

This is what working with me looks like.

Curious About AI?

The questions I get asked most often.

You don't need to understand AI deeply to benefit from it. But here's what helps to know.

01
Do I need to be technical to use AI in my business?

Not at all. The tools I use are built for non-technical people. If you can send a WhatsApp message, you can use these systems. I handle all the setup and hand you something that just works.

Ask me about your business →
02
Will AI replace my staff or change how my team works?

No. AI handles the repetitive tasks nobody wants to do anyway — answering the same question for the 50th time, sending follow-ups, capturing data. Your team gets freed up to do actual work. Nobody gets replaced. Everyone gets relieved.

Let's talk about your team →
03
How quickly will I actually see a difference?

Most clients feel the impact within the first week. The automation starts running immediately — and within a month, you'll wonder how you managed without it. I don't build things and disappear. I'm there for 30 days to make sure it sticks.

Book your free discovery call →
How It Works

What working with me
actually looks like.

Four steps. No jargon. You tell me where it hurts — I build the fix.

01
We Talk

A free 30-minute discovery call. I ask about your day, your business, and where you feel stuck. Zero pitch. Zero pressure. Just honest conversation.

02
I Find the Leak

I map your workflow and show you exactly where the time is going. You see the problem clearly — and what fixing it would actually look like.

03
I Build It

I design and build the automation using tools that connect to what you already use. You don't learn the tech. That's my job. You just tell me the result you want.

04
You Run Free

I hand over a running system with a plain-English SOP and 30 days of personal support. Within days, you feel the difference.
